## Security and Privacy

<!-- VeilLend handles wallet, lending, and financial privacy workflows. Call out risk clearly. -->

- [ ] This PR does not expose secrets, private keys, wallet signatures, tokens, or user financial data
- [ ] Auth, RBAC, wallet verification, or security-sensitive logic was reviewed carefully
- [ ] User privacy, transaction history, portfolio data, or protocol configuration impact was considered
- [ ] New logs or errors avoid leaking sensitive data
